name_en: Great Ginkgo of Annaka Elementary School
description_en: A monument (natural monument), the great ginkgo (ichō) tree of Annaka Elementary School. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 1973-05-11, located at Annaka 3-chōme 10-43.
A monument (natural monument), the great cedar tree of Gorō. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 1974-06-27, located at Matsuida-machi Sakamoto (Dōzen).
A monument (natural monument), a higan cherry tree at Gyōda. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 1977-06-25, located at Matsuida-machi Gyōda 978-3.

A monument (natural monument), a silverberry (gumi) tree at Onga. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 1982-03-24, located at Matsuida-machi Nishinomaki 16902-3.

name_en: Holly Olive of Isobe Shinmeigū Shrine
description_en: A monument (natural monument), the holly olive (hiiragi) of Isobe Shinmeigū Shrine. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 1986-02-26, located at Isobe 4-chōme 898.

name_en: Amur Adonis Native Habitat of Kimaze
description_en: A monument (natural monument), the native habitat of the Amur adonis (fukujusō) at Kimaze. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 1987-02-27, located at Matsuida-machi Kami-Masuda 2051-3.

A monument (natural monument), the fragrant olive (mokusei) of Kensōji Temple. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 1987-02-27, located at Matsuida-machi Hijio 2331.
A monument (natural monument), the sacred grove (shasō) of Enoshita Shrine. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 2004-03-25, located at Haraichi 3451.
A monument (historic site), the Iwajuku archaeological site. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.
A monument (historic site), the Saida Nakajima archaeological site. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.

name_romaji: Okanobori Jirobē Kageyoshi Kō no Haka
name_en: Grave of Lord Okanobori Jirobē Kageyoshi
description_en: A monument (historic site), the grave of Lord Okanobori Jirobē Kageyoshi. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the remains of a Jōmon-period dwelling at Azami. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Mitsumata Water Distribution Gate of the Okanobori Irrigation Channel
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Mitsumata water-distribution gate of the Okanobori irrigation channel. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the main hall (honden) of Ikushina Shrine. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a layered stone lantern-pagoda (sekidō) at Yamagiwa. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Amida Triad and Stone Buddhas of Umamioka
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising an Amida triad and stone Buddhist images at Umamioka. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_romaji: Iwajuku Iseki Chūshajō Chiten Shutsudo Sekki
name_en: Stone Tools Excavated at the Parking Lot Locality of the Iwajuku Site
description_en: A monument (historic site) comprising stone tools excavated at the parking lot locality of the Iwajuku site. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.

name_en: Pottery Excavated from the Site Behind Seisenji Temple
description_en: A monument (historic site), the pottery excavated from the site behind Seisenji Temple. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.

name_en: Pottery Excavated from the Shimizu Nishioka Site
description_en: A monument (historic site), the pottery excavated from the Shimizu Nishioka site. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.

name_romaji: Jinja Ura Iseki Shutsudo Fukabachigata Doki
name_en: Deep-Bowl Pottery Excavated from the Site Behind the Shrine
description_en: A monument (historic site), a deep-bowl earthenware vessel excavated from the site behind the shrine. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a casting mold for animal-leg (jūkyaku) supports. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a votive haiku tablet (haigaku) of Kanayama Shrine. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a single wakizashi short sword. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A folk cultural property, the Yokochō Daidai Kagura sacred dance. It is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the tuff rock outcrop at Umamioka. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A monument (natural monument), a hackberry (enoki) tree at Shika-no-Kawanuma. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a canopied stone stupa (kasatōba) depicting the welcoming Amida triad. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a statue of Yakushi Nyorai (the Medicine Buddha) at Nakajima. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, an Amida triad of Chōenji Temple. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a nutmeg-yew (kaya) tree. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A monument (natural monument), a colony of dogtooth violets (katakuri). It is a municipally designated natural monument of Midori City.

name_en: Spouted Pottery Excavated from the Azami Site
description_en: A monument (historic site), a spouted earthenware vessel excavated from the Azami site. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.
A monument (historic site), the Tenjinyama cluster of burial mounds. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.

name_en: Artifacts Excavated from Tenjinyama Tomb No. 3
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising artifacts excavated from Tenjinyama Tomb No. 3. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the Yakushi hall at Anabara. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Wooden Statue of the Bodhisattva Kokūzō
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a wooden statue of the bodhisattva Kokūzō. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Kōshin Monument and Statue of Dainichi Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising a Kōshin stone monument and a statue of Dainichi Nyorai. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Enkū Buddha "Standing Statue of the Bodhisattva Gakkō"
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an Enkū-style standing statue of the bodhisattva Gakkō. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the Obira limestone cave. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_romaji: Oka Naosaburō Shōten Ōmama Kōjō Tenpo Oyobi Omoya, Bunkogura
name_en: Ōmama Factory Shop, Main House, and Storehouse of Oka Naosaburō Shōten
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the Ōmama factory shop, main house, and document storehouse of the Oka Naosaburō Shōten. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
